caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt is seated behind a professional microphone in a room filled with framed photographs and clothing racks. His t-shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". In the background, a white mannequin is visible next to a rack of apparel. The scene begins with the man looking forward and talking. As the sequence progresses, he closes his eyes and smiles, then looks slightly to the side. In the final sequence, he brings a red cup to his lips to take a drink. Small logos are visible in the bottom corners of the screen, including one that reads "BORN REALLY". The background remains static while the man's facial expressions and movements shift as he interacts with the microphone and the red cup.
